hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-normal tracking-tight uppercase

surface_styles.primary_button: bg-[#F5A623] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#F5A623]/90 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1

components_strategy.marketing_sections: Custom HTML/Tailwind for hero, bento grids, aggressive asymmetry.
components_strategy.fixtures_standings: Dense tables with high contrast, 1px bottom borders, hover rows.
components_strategy.player_cards: Cardless or subtle 1px border cards, intense grayscale portrait + neon gold number/name on hover.
components_strategy.interactive_logic: Shadcn UI customized for dark/athletic theme (sharp corners, gold accents).

animations.hover: Subtle translate-y, border color shift to #F5A623
animations.entrance: Framer motion fade up with stagger for grids

hero_stadium.description: Stadium night background for Hero Section

youth_academy.description: Kids playing football for the Academy section

crest_logo_element.description: Laurel wreath and dove element in gold, isolated on transparent background. Use as watermark or branding accent.

dark_texture_bg.description: Dark sports abstract texture for repeating sections or footer background

placeholder_match.description: Football match action for News/Updates cards

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures.
Use Shadcn UI with hard corners (rounded-none) for Tabs, Forms, Tables.
Text sizes: DO NOT exceed text-6xl/7xl for H1. Bebas Neue naturally looks compact, so 6xl-7xl is optimal.
Hero overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent for stadium readability.
The admin dashboard should use a strict grid with dense data views (Archetype 2 style).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
